name: Pang Tong
title: The Mentor
flavor: A wise advisor at the imperial court.

name: Sun Shangxiang
title: Warrior Princess
flavor: The fierce princess of Wu.

name: Zhao Yun
title: The Brave General
flavor: A loyal general with unyielding honor.

name: Villager
title: Simple Farmer
flavor: A villager who must defend himself.

name: Villager
title: Wandering Merchant
flavor: A traveling merchant with a few cards.

name: Villager
title: Village Elder
flavor: The most experienced duelist in the village.

name: Cao Pi
title: The Hero's Rival
flavor: The ambitious son of the Wei clan.

name: Zhang Jue
title: Master of the Yellow Sky
flavor: The leader of the Yellow Turbans. His sorcery is overwhelming.

name: Tang Long
title: The Tiger
flavor: His deck is as wild as a tiger on the hunt.

name: Hua Min
title: Mistress of Metamorphosis
flavor: Her creatures transform before your very eyes.

name: Feng Hua
title: Dance of the Fenghuang
flavor: Born from ashes, indestructible and beautiful.

name: Jake Steele
title: Master of Machines
flavor: Cold steel meets brute force.

name: Dao Ren
title: Master of the Trigrams
flavor: The eight symbols reveal the future to him.

name: Bai Chen
title: Lord of the Jiangshi
flavor: His undead servants know neither fatigue nor mercy.

name: Maximilian Crest
title: The Last Samurai
flavor: A master of the blade from a forgotten era.

name: Yü Yan
title: Voice of the Xuanwu
flavor: The water obeys her will.

name: Wei Pi
title: Heir of the Dragon Throne
flavor: His dragon fire devours everything.

name: Huang Bing
title: Yellow Turban Foot Soldier
flavor: The first enemy after returning to the past.

name: Zhao Yun
title: The Brave General (2nd Duel)
flavor: The general challenges you once again.

name: Sun Shangxiang
title: Warrior Princess (2nd Duel)
flavor: The princess reveals her true strength.

name: Zhan Liu
title: Apprentice of the Water Shrine
flavor: His damp current is only the beginning.

name: Xuan Shui
title: Master of the Water Shrine
flavor: The dark water devours everything.

name: Qing Miao
title: Apprentice of the Wood Shrine
flavor: A green sprout that becomes a tree.

name: Ku Mu
title: Master of the Wood Shrine
flavor: Dead wood that still lives.

name: Huang Sha
title: Apprentice of the Earth Shrine
flavor: The yellow sand swallows everything.

name: Hou Tu
title: Master of the Earth Shrine
flavor: Heavy earth, immovable stone.

name: Duan Ren
title: Apprentice of the Metal Shrine
flavor: The forged blade seeks its target.

name: Bai Jin
title: Master of the Metal Shrine
flavor: White gold — unbreakable and eternal.

name: Xiao Yan
title: Apprentice of the Fire Shrine
flavor: The small flame burns everything.

name: Chi Yan
title: Master of the Fire Shrine
flavor: The red flame knows no mercy.

name: Mi Hun
title: The Misleading Soul
flavor: Neither human nor spirit — the labyrinth itself.

name: Cao Pi
title: The Hero's Rival (2nd Duel)
flavor: The traitor reveals his true face.

name: Shan Hu
title: The Mountain Tiger
flavor: Silent, waiting, invincible.

name: Ye Lang
title: The Night Wolf
flavor: Aggressive from the very first round.

name: Zhang Jue
title: Master of the Yellow Sky (2nd Duel)
flavor: This time he must fall.

name: Cao Pi
title: Forced Alliance
flavor: A fragile alliance against a greater threat.

name: Lu Bu
title: The Invincible Warrior
flavor: Unleashed by Zhang Jue — pure destruction.

name: Lu Bu & Chituma
title: Rider and Steed
flavor: The true form — physical immortality.

name: Cao Cao
title: The Man Behind It All
flavor: Duel Master C — the true master.
